meaning: n.特派员,专车,专刊adj.特别的,特殊的,专门的,专用的
examples: You're very special to me, darling.
The task poses no special problems.
We don't want any special treatment.
But that means adding to bad debt reserves or posting a special loss, hurting earnings.
But its instruments employ special detectors that need to be chilled to fantastically low temperatures.
